Description: Defines an AWS CodeBuild project for building and deploying the web application. Triggered by EventBridge.

ProjectName.Description: The overall project name, used for naming resources.

CodeBuildServiceRoleArn.Description: ARN of the IAM service role for CodeBuild.

SourceRepositoryUrl.Description: URL of the GitHub source code repository (e.g., https://github.com/user/repo.git).

BuildSpecFile.Description: Path to the buildspec file in the source repository.

RootStackNamePrefix.Description: Prefix for the CloudFormation root stack name (branch name will be appended by buildspec).

RootTemplateFileInRepo.Description: Path to the root CloudFormation template file in the repository.

EnvVarProjectNameForCfn.Description: Value for the 'ProjectName' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarDomainNameForCfn.Description: Value for the 'DomainName' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarSubdomainBaseForCfn.Description: Base for the 'Subdomain' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack (e.g., '@' for main, '{branch}' for others). Buildspec will process this.

EnvVarHostedZoneIdForCfn.Description: Value for the 'HostedZoneId' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarAcmCertificateArnForCfn.Description: Value for the 'AcmCertificateArn' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarStaticAssetsS3BucketNameForCfn.Description: Value for the 'StaticAssetsS3BucketName' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack. Also used by buildspec for uploads.

EnvVarLambdaFunctionNameForCfn.Description: Value for the 'LambdaFunctionName' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarLambdaHandlerForCfn.Description: Value for the 'LambdaHandler' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarLambdaRuntimeForCfn.Description: Value for the 'LambdaRuntime' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarLambdaCodeS3KeyPatternForCfn.Description: S3 key pattern for Lambda code (e.g., lambda/{branch}/app.zip). Buildspec uses this.

EnvVarApiGatewayStageNameForCfn.Description: Value for the 'ApiGatewayStageName' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

EnvVarStaticAssetPathPatternForCfn.Description: Value for the 'StaticAssetPathPattern' parameter of the root CloudFormation stack.

Description.Fn::Sub: Builds and deploys the ${ProjectName} web application.

CodeBuildProjectName.Description: Name of the AWS CodeBuild project.

CodeBuildProjectArn.Description: ARN of the AWS CodeBuild project.
